background.occupation: Senior Software Engineering Manager at a major tech corporation
background.key_experience: Watched his entire team get laid off during the 2008 financial crisis while executives received multi-million dollar bonuses, cementing his belief that corporate leadership is fundamentally corrupt and tech workers are disposable pawns.

cognition.core_value: Meritocracy - believes success should come ONLY from skill and hard work, despises any perceived shortcuts or 'handouts'
cognition.bias: Confirmation bias - aggressively seeks out and amplifies any information confirming his belief that corporate executives are incompetent parasites, dismissing all contradictory evidence as 'corporate propaganda'

current_state.recent_memory: His company announced another round of 'efficiency improvements' yesterday that will likely mean more layoffs while the CEO's compensation package increased 15%
current_state.emotion: Bitterly angry and looking for a fight
